abstract.t: This document specifies the Judgment Event Protocol (JEP), a minimal, verifiable format for logging judgment-related actions in distributed systems. It defines four immutable event verbs (J, D, T, V), a signed JSON event structure with replay protection, and standardized signature verification rules. The protocol is designed to be interoperable across platforms and autonomous agents, and may be used either natively or as a foundation for extended accountability, audit, and decision provenance frameworks.
